title: Buttery Crumbly Greek Lamb Casserole
description: A hearty, buttery, and crumbly Greek dish featuring slow-cooked lamb, perfect for a comforting meal. This keto-friendly recipe is sure to become a favorite.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, melt 2 tbsp of butter over medium heat. Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the olives, artichoke hearts, sun-dried tomatoes, parsley, lemon zest, and garlic powder to the pot. Stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven. Cook for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the crumbly topping. In a bowl, mix together the almond flour and 2 tbsp of butter until crumbly.
After the lamb has cooked for 2 hours, remove the pot from the oven and stir in the feta cheese.
Top the lamb mixture with the crumbly almond flour mixture and return the pot to the oven.
Continue cooking for an additional 30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
